title: Define the first bounded maintenance milestone
goal: Create the first real Claude-managed maintenance slice for Zoplicate without broadening into unrelated refactors.
in_scope: Define the first bounded product task after workflow adoption.
Identify the exact source, test, and Zotero manual-verification surfaces implicated by that task.
Document non-goals and acceptance in a milestone spec that Claude can execute without guessing.
out_of_scope: Broad workflow rewrites unrelated to adoption
acceptance: The milestone has explicit in-scope and out-of-scope boundaries.
The milestone names the implicated files or directories and the expected test coverage.
Any required manual Zotero verification is called out explicitly.
